steps.title: Find the earlier claim
steps.content: The sentence states that our understanding of walking decisions is “insufficiently robust”—this key assertion requires explanation.

steps.title: Match the underlined portion's function
steps.content:
The underlined portion elaborates on “insufficiently robust” by showing what that means in practice: various studies examine different factors (norms, sidewalk width), but walking decisions are made in contexts with multiple conditions.

The other choices mischaracterize the function:
  • A treats variety of emphases as disagreement
  • B confuses explanation for summary
  • D invents an objection
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
